client_id.description: Strava OAuth 2.0 client ID for the refresh-token grant. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

client_secret.description: Strava OAuth 2.0 client secret. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived Strava OAuth 2.0 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it).

base_url.description: Strava API base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: Strava OAuth 2.0 token endpoint override. MUST be http(s) with a host; the hook fails closed on an invalid value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token/client secret to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

athlete_id.description: The authenticated athlete's numeric Strava ID. Required only for the athlete_stats stream, whose resource path substitutes {athlete_id}.
